targets.query: SELECT COUNT(response_time) FROM  "$test"  WHERE  "test_type"='$test_type' AND "env"='$env' AND "method"!='TRANSACTION' AND $timeFilter
SELECT COUNT(response_time) FROM  "$test"  WHERE "test_type"='$test_type' AND  "env"='$env' AND "status" = 'KO' AND "method"!='TRANSACTION' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY count

SELECT MEAN("throughput") FROM  (SELECT count("response_time") AS "throughput"  from "$test"  WHERE "test_type"='$test_type' AND "method"!='TRANSACTION' AND  "env"='$env' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1s))
SELECT min("response_time") FROM  "$test"  WHERE  "status" = 'OK' AND "method"!='TRANSACTION'  AND  "env"='$env' AND $timeFilter
SELECT median("response_time") FROM  "$test"  WHERE  "status" = 'OK' AND "method"!='TRANSACTION' AND  "env"='$env' AND $timeFilter
SELECT percentile("response_time", $percentile) FROM  "$test"  WHERE  "status" = 'OK' AND "method"!='TRANSACTION'  AND  "env"='$env' AND $timeFilter
select sum("max") from (select max("active") from "users" group by lg_id) WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($grouping) fill(0)

SELECT max("throughputt") FROM (SELECT count("response_time") AS "throughputt"  from "$test"  WHERE  "test_type"='$test_type' AND  "env"='$env' AND "status" = 'OK' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1s)) GROUP BY time($grouping)

SELECT mean("throughput") FROM (SELECT count("response_time") AS "throughput"  from "$test"  WHERE "simulation"= '$test' AND "test_type"='$test_type' AND  "env"='$env' AND "status" = 'OK' AND sampler_type=~ /^$sampler_type$/  AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1s)) GROUP BY time($grouping)

SELECT max("throughputt") FROM (SELECT count("response_time") AS "throughputt"  from "$test"  WHERE  "test_type"='$test_type' AND  "env"='$env' AND "status" = 'KO' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1s)) GROUP BY time($grouping)
select sum("max") from (select max("active") from "users" group by lg_id) WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($grouping) fill(0)

SELECT max("throughputt") FROM (SELECT count("response_time") AS "throughputt"  from "$test"  WHERE  "test_type"='$test_type' AND  "env"='$env' AND "status" = 'OK' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1s)) GROUP BY time($grouping)

SELECT max("throughputt") FROM (SELECT count("response_time") AS "throughputt"  from "$test"  WHERE  "test_type"='$test_type' AND  "env"='$env' AND "status" = 'KO' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1s)) GROUP BY time($grouping)
SELECT mean("response_time") FROM /^$test$/ WHERE "test_type"='$test_type' AND  "env"='$env' AND "status" = 'KO' AND "method"!='TRANSACTION'  AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($grouping)
SELECT mean("response_time") FROM /^$test$/ WHERE "test_type"='$test_type' AND  "env"='$env' AND "status" = 'OK' AND "method"!='TRANSACTION'  AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($grouping)

SELECT percentile("response_time", $percentile) FROM "$test" WHERE "test_type"='$test_type' AND  "env"='$env' and "status"='OK' AND "method"!='TRANSACTION'AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($grouping), request_name fill(none)
select sum("max") from (select max("active") from "users" where "test_type"='$test_type' AND  "env"='$env' group by lg_id) WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($grouping) fill(0)

panels.title: OK Response Times Over Time ($grouping aggregation)

targets.query: SELECT percentile("response_time", $percentile) FROM "$test" WHERE "test_type"='$test_type' AND  "env"='$env' and "status"='KO' AND "method"!='TRANSACTION'AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($grouping), request_name fill(none)
select sum("max") from (select max("active") from "users" where "test_type"='$test_type' AND  "env"='$env' group by lg_id) WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($grouping) fill(0)

panels.title: KO Response Times Over Time ($grouping aggregation)

targets.query: SELECT COUNT("response_time") FROM "$test" WHERE status='OK' AND "response_time"<=$low_limit AND env ='$env' AND "method"!='TRANSACTION' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($grouping) fill(null)

SELECT COUNT("response_time") FROM "$test" WHERE status='OK' AND "response_time">$low_limit AND "response_time"<$high_limit  AND env ='$env' AND "method"!='TRANSACTION' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($grouping) fill(null)
SELECT COUNT("response_time")  FROM "$test" WHERE status='OK' AND "response_time">=$high_limit  AND env ='$env' AND "method"!='TRANSACTION' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($grouping) fill(null)
SELECT COUNT("response_time") FROM "$test" WHERE status='KO' AND sampler_type=~ /^$sampler_type$/ AND env ='$env' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($grouping) fill(null)
SELECT mean("connect_time") FROM $test WHERE  "env" =~ /^$env$/ AND "test_type" =~ /^$test_type$/  AND "method"!='TRANSACTION' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($grouping), "request_name" fill(null)

list.definition: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM /.*/ WITH KEY = "test_type"
